_meta.name: p13
_meta.method: warm-index column-sum + saturated-core centroid; visual confirmation against crosshair crops

supersedes.why_old_failed: Hand-mark biased sun_x by +14 px (flares pulled centroid right) and assumed symmetric offsets of 220 px; actual offsets are 212-213 px, sun is at x=543, and inferred h is ~7° not 17°.

r22_source_note: Inherited from Phase 2 multi-photo calibration (R22=210); refined to 211 in the 2026-05-13 re-anchor. The Phase 2 R22 came from a 22° halo ring fit, not from the parhelion. Pass B1 classification 2026-05-13; lever sec(h)-1 = 0.71%, anchor-noise-bounded — clean residual is informational, not route-validating. Audit memo §2 item 4 hedges: 'On those photos a 0 px residual is anchor-noise-bounded, not route-validated.'
